commands.review_summary:
The branch hoists the normalized Telegram `defaultAccount`, suppresses the missing `accounts.default` warning when it names a listed account, adds a multi-account regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main resolves a configured `defaultAccount` but still warns when that same account is also the first sorted account id. I did not run a live command because this review is read-only and tests may write artifacts.
